product_overview: A small static website serving the VECT brand guide, technical deck and main site content. The site provides core brand assets and a privacy policy, delivered as static HTML pages.
core_goals: Present the VECT brand, technical deck, and marketing landing content in a lightweight, static site.
Provide a publicly accessible privacy policy and legal information.
Keep the implementation simple and low-maintenance (static HTML/CSS/JS).
Ensure reliable delivery of site assets (fast 200 responses) and clear handling of missing resources (404/500).

features.name: Website Homepage
features.description: Landing page for the VECT brand website that serves the main HTML for the site.

features.name: Website Privacy Policy
features.description: Privacy information page providing the site's privacy policy as static HTML.
